hooks.command: command -v crucible >/dev/null 2>&1 && crucible hook session-start || true
hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command crucible -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { crucible hook session-start }

hooks.command: command -v crucible >/dev/null 2>&1 && crucible hook stop || true
hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command crucible -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { crucible hook stop }
